CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.SYS_USERS (U_NAME VARCHAR(100), U_ID INT);
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS WHERE U_ID > 2;
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS ORDER BY U_NAME DESC;
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM (SELECT U_NAME, U_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS WHERE U_ID < 4) AS filtered_users;
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS JOIN (SELECT U_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS WHERE U_NAME LIKE 'a%') AS a_users ON DB.DBA.SYS_USERS.U_ID = a_users.U_ID;
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS GROUP BY U_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT U_NAME, U_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS) AS distinct_users;
CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.ADDITIONAL_USERS (A_NAME VARCHAR(100), A_ID INT);
SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_USERS UNION SELECT DB.DBA.VECTOR_CONCAT_AGG (vector (A_NAME, A_ID)) FROM DB.DBA.ADDITIONAL_USERS;
